name: Basic Custard Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Line the quiche pan with the pastry, pinch up a rim, and prick the bottom all over with a fork. Partially bake the pastry if desired, then set aside.
2. To make the filling: Whisk together eggs, flour, nutmeg, salt, and white pepper. Blend in heavy cream and milk.
3. Evenly distribute cheese, meat, and/or vegetables in the prepared shell, then pour in the custard filling. If using high-moisture vegetables like tomatoes, zucchini, or mushrooms, cook them first to evaporate some water content.
4. Preheat oven to 375°F. Place filled pan on a baking sheet. Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until custard is just set. Let rest 8-10 minutes before slicing and serving. Make one 9-11 inch tart or four 4-inch tarts.
This basic custard mixture can be used in many quiches. Try adding grated cheese, vegetables, leftover meat, poultry, or seafood, or any other ingredients you like.
